overview.description: The ClearShares Piton Intermediate Fixed Income ETF (PIFI) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ICE BofA US Broad Market index. The fund is actively managed to invest in a variety of USD-denominated bonds with an average portfolio maturity of 0-10 years, carrying an investment-grade rating. PIFI was launched on Oct 2, 2020 and is issued by ClearShares.
infoTable: ICE BofA US Broad Market Index
